channel.title: CAINA Capstone - Generate, Deploy & Validate a Design with an Agent on TCS Labs Academy
channel.description: Recent content in CAINA Capstone - Generate, Deploy & Validate a Design with an Agent on TCS Labs Academy

item.title: CAINA Capstone - Generate, Deploy & Validate a Design with an Agent
item.description:
Introduction 🔗

This is the hands-on capstone for the Certified AI-Native Infrastructure Associate (CAINA). You will take an application from a plain-language brief to a deployed, validated Meshery design - using an LLM to generate the design, a coding agent to drive the deployment, and Meshery to validate it. This mirrors the everyday loop of an AI-native platform engineer: describe intent, let AI draft the infrastructure, then verify before it ships.
